claim: A genetics study identified a mutation that increased disease risk by 3.5 times in affected individuals.

corpus.title: Genetic Mutation Risk Analysis
corpus.snippet: A genetics study identified a mutation that increased disease risk by 3.5 times in affected individuals....
corpus.content: Mutation carriers showed a 3.5x higher disease risk compared to non-carriers.

corpus.title: News: Genomic Health Lab — Accurate Report
corpus.snippet: A genetics study identified a mutation that increased disease risk by 3.5 times in affected individu...
corpus.content:
Genomic Health Lab ANNOUNCES KEY SCIENTIFIC UPDATE

A genetics study identified a mutation that increased disease risk by 3.5 times in affected individuals. The announcement comes as changes in the scientific sector. Observers say this could have significant implications for scientific stakeholders. The full impact is expected to become clear over the coming months.

corpus.title: Report: Genomic Health Lab — Distorted Account
corpus.snippet: A genetics study identified a mutation that increased disease risk by 3.5 times in affected individu...
corpus.content:
Genomic Health Lab ANNOUNCES SHOCKING SCIENTIFIC REVELATION

A genetics study identified a mutation that increased disease risk by 3.5 times in affected individuals. The announcement comes as growing scrutiny in the scientific sector. Observers say this could have significant implications for scientific stakeholders. The full impact is expected to become clear over the coming months.
